decision: max_retries default 3->7
reasoning: free-tier 429 bursts outlast ~7s (3 retries); 7 retries ~=127s rides longer windows; only the default changes

decision: backoff 1/2/4/8/16/32/64s = existing base(1.0)*2**attempt over 7 attempts
reasoning: no code-shape change; sequence falls out of existing formula + new ceiling

decision: truncate (repo,item_type) to N newest by created_at desc BEFORE summarize
reasoning: dropping oldest keeps freshest context; pre-summarize = zero LLM cost for dropped items

decision: mark_seen still records FULL collected set despite truncation
reasoning: idempotency invariant (BR-V2-001-002) — dropped items must not re-fetch next run

decision: [watchlist] max_items_per_type positive int default 10, fail-fast validated
reasoning: mirror lookback_days guard; reject bool/float/str and <1

decision: renderer emits '⚠️ +{count} items not shown (limit: {N})' per repo when dropped>0
reasoning: reader must know truncation happened; per-repo aggregate; absent when 0 keeps output byte-identical

decision: renderer learns dropped counts via a new render() param (dict repo->count) + cap
reasoning: renderer is pure — can't reconstruct dropped items; shape is an architect ADR, AC pins only observable output

decision: Option A: per-repo header embed + one embed per item
reasoning: one-embed-per-repo (v4-001) is still a wall; per-item is scannable

decision: item embed color = fixed item-type map (issue red/release green/discussion blurple/fallback), header yellow
reasoning: user-specified hues; fixed map is trivially deterministic — no hash, no PYTHONHASHSEED risk (simpler than v4-001)

decision: item embed title truncated to 256 code points
reasoning: Discord embed-title hard limit; code points not bytes per project len(str) convention (v2-005)

decision: per-item data reaches adapter via architect-chosen mechanism (widened seam vs in-adapter parse), no github/summarizer/cache import
reasoning: rendered Markdown carries item_type only implicitly + title/summary in quote/em-dash line format => re-parse fragile; structured list cleaner. Conflicts w/ v4-001 string-only seam lesson — architect must reconcile

decision: preserve <=10-embeds/request batching with header+item embeds counted together
reasoning: per-item embeds multiply embed count; 10 items+1 header=11 spans 2 requests; reuse v4-001 batch path

decision: truncate in a dedicated _truncate_per_type pipeline step between _collect_all and _summarize; keep-newest by filtering original all_items to survivor set
reasoning: structural placement makes 'full set mark_seen'd, then truncate, then summarize' an invariant not a comment (v2-001 lesson); filter-in-place preserves input order => byte-identical no-op; ISO created_at sorts lexicographically desc
rejected: truncate inside _summarize (dropped items past the summarize boundary)

decision: renderer learns dropped counts via additive kw params render(..., dropped_counts=None, max_items_per_type=None); alert line appended after ## repo header when count>0
reasoning: None defaults keep existing calls byte-identical + transform pure (models+stdlib only); no import; exact line matches locked AC-V4-002-007
rejected: attach counts to items/parse downstream (renderer can't attach to dropped items)

decision: per-item embeds built by in-adapter re-parse of rendered Markdown (extend _parse_sections); deliver(content:str) UNCHANGED; no github/summarizer/cache import; fixed item-type color dict; zero-parsed-items => plain-text fallback
reasoning: hard constraint forbids widened seam + upstream import; in-adapter parse reuses v4-001 'payload-shape CR stays inside the adapter' lesson; Markdown carries repo/lookback(##header), item_type(### label reverse-map), title/summary(item line)
rejected: widen delivery seam to structured item list (violates port-must-not-change)
import upstream item models (violates no-import boundary)

decision: retry ceiling is a config-default change only: SummarizerConfig.max_retries 3->7
reasoning: 1/2/4/8/16/32/64s falls out of existing base*2**attempt; no _call_with_retry reshape; Retry-After + skip-log-continue unchanged
rejected: explicit delay list [1,2,4,8,16,32,64] (needless code churn for identical sequence)

decision: dropped_counts shape dict[str,dict[str,int]] (repo->item_type->count) not flat dict[str,int]
reasoning: preserves per-type granularity; renderer sums for alert; more info at zero extra cost

decision: re imported inside _parse_sections body as local import
reasoning: keeps module namespace clean; Python import cache means no perf cost; tolerated by ruff
rejected: module-level import (minor style issue, not a correctness concern)

decision: removed _EMBED_PALETTE and _color_for_repo entirely (not just superseded)
reasoning: ADR-003 and design.md both say remove/replace; keeping dead code confuses future readers
rejected: deprecation comment leaving code in place

decision: zero-items fallback checks sum of parsed items across ALL sections, not just section count
reasoning: sections with no parseable item lines (plain body, no-new-items doc) still have section headers; sum==0 is the correct trigger for format-drift fallback
rejected: fallback only on zero sections (misses plain-body section case)

decision: replaced test_embed_batching_sends_multiple_requests with test_embed_batching_10_items_plus_header
reasoning: old test used 11 sections (no item lines) → zero parsed items → plain-text fallback, not embeds; new test uses 10 item lines + header = 11 embeds which is the actual AC-V4-002-008 scenario
rejected: keep old test (would fail due to fallback logic)

decision: GO — 0 bugs, 15/15 ACs verified, 727 tests pass, coverage 90%
reasoning: All 4 tweaks (retry x7, truncation, alert, Option-A embeds) correct; byte-identical no-op confirmed; T1 preserved; mark_seen idempotency structural; no hollow assertions found
